About

A Zero-LTI Record Across
Two Decades of High-Stakes Projects

With 21 years of operational HSE and Fire Life Safety leadership, including 9+ years embedded in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's most complex infrastructure programmes, I bring a proven record of protecting people and enabling project delivery without compromise.

My portfolio spans GIGA-scale developments, oil & gas infrastructure, high-rise occupancy management, manufacturing, and heritage-sensitive construction — including KAFD Riyadh, RCU AlUla, Digital City Riyadh, and PARCO Refinery. Across all 11 projects, the LTI record remains zero.

I operate at the intersection of strategic HSE leadership and operational delivery — building systems that work, teams that own safety, and cultures that sustain performance beyond the project lifecycle.
